toast.source: 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara - 229 West Montecito Street - Thursday, June 25' DETAILED Daily Performance Summary (freshest Toast at the Sat Jun 27 4 AM Gmail run). Fri Jun 26 summary not delivered yet.
toast.note: Thu Jun 25 (detailed 229 W Montecito summary): Net $5,993.65 (-9.9% vs same day last week $6,650.05; +22.0% vs 4-wk avg $4,911.69), Gross $6,279.10 (-8.0% vs SDLW $6,822.15; +22.6% vs 4-wk avg). Voids $86.50, Discounts $285.45, Labor 17.6% ($1,053.29). 220 covers (vs 231 SDLW), 144 orders (vs 128 SDLW, +12.5%). Softer than last Thursday but well above the 4-week average; more orders, lower labor %.
